  "cells": [
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "import pandas as pd\n",
        "\n",
        "df = pd.read_excel('Cleaned_data.xlsx')\n",
        "\n",
        "df.head()\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "# Load datasets\n",
        "df2021 = pd.read_csv('/content/tn_2021_results.csv')\n",
        "df2026 = pd.read_csv('/content/tn_2026_results.csv')\n",
        "\n",
        "# Check first few rows\n",
        "print(df2021.head())\n",
        "print(df2026.head())\n",
        "\n",
        "# Find winners in 2021\n",
        "winner2021 = df2021.loc[\n",
        "    df2021.groupby('ac_number')['votes'].idxmax()\n",
        "]\n",
        "\n",
        "# Find winners in 2026\n",
        "winner2026 = df2026.loc[\n",
        "    df2026.groupby('ac_number')['votes'].idxmax()\n",
        "]\n",
        "\n",
        "# Keep only important columns\n",
        "winner2021 = winner2021[\n",
        "    ['ac_number', 'constituency', 'party', 'region']\n",
        "]\n",
        "\n",
        "winner2021.columns = [\n",
        "    'ac_number',\n",
        "    'constituency',\n",
        "    'winner_2021',\n",
        "    'region'\n",
        "]\n",
        "\n",
        "winner2026 = winner2026[\n",
        "    ['ac_number', 'constituency', 'party']\n",
        "]\n",
        "\n",
        "winner2026.columns = [\n",
        "    'ac_number',\n",
        "    'constituency',\n",
        "    'winner_2026'\n",
        "]\n",
        "\n",
        "# Merge both datasets\n",
        "comparison = pd.merge(\n",
        "    winner2021,\n",
        "    winner2026,\n",
        "    on=['ac_number', 'constituency']\n",
        ")\n",
        "\n",
        "# Detect flipped constituencies\n",
        "comparison['flipped'] = (\n",
        "    comparison['winner_2021']\n",
        "    !=\n",
        "    comparison['winner_2026']\n",
        ")\n",
        "\n",
        "# Filter only flipped constituencies\n",
        "flipped = comparison[\n",
        "    comparison['flipped'] == True\n",
        "]\n",
        "\n",
        "# Display results\n",
        "print(\"\\nFlipped Constituencies:\")\n",
        "print(flipped.head(20))\n",
        "\n",
        "# Total flips\n",
        "print(\"\\nTotal Flipped Constituencies:\")\n",
        "print(flipped.shape[0])\n",
        "\n",
        "flip_summary = flipped.groupby(\n",
        "    ['winner_2021', 'winner_2026']\n",
        ").size().reset_index(name='count')\n",
        "\n",
        "flip_summary = flip_summary.sort_values(\n",
        "    by='count',\n",
        "    ascending=False\n",
        ")\n",
        "\n",
        "print(flip_summary.head(20))\n",
        "\n",
        "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
        "\n",
        "# Get flip patterns (already created earlier)\n",
        "flip_summary = flipped.groupby(\n",
        "    ['winner_2021', 'winner_2026']\n",
        ").size().reset_index(name='count')\n",
        "\n",
        "# Sort highest flips first\n",
        "top_flips = flip_summary.sort_values(\n",
        "    by='count',\n",
        "    ascending=False\n",
        ").head(10)\n",
        "\n",
        "# Create labels like \"DMK → TVK\"\n",
        "labels = (\n",
        "    top_flips['winner_2021'] + \" → \" + top_flips['winner_2026']\n",
        ")\n",
        "\n",
        "# Plot chart\n",
        "plt.figure(figsize=(12,6))\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.bar(labels, top_flips['count'])\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.xticks(rotation=45)\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.xlabel(\"Party Shift\")\n",
        "plt.ylabel(\"Number of Constituencies\")\n",
        "plt.title(\"Top Constituency Flip Patterns (2021 → 2026)\")\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.tight_layout()\n",
        "\n",
        "# SAVE FIRST (very important)\n",
        "plt.savefig(\"top_constituency_flips.png\", dpi=300)\n",
        "\n",
        "# SHOW CHART\n",
        "plt.show()"
      ],
      "metadata": {

    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "# Count flipped constituencies by region\n",
        "region_flips = flipped.groupby(\n",
        "    'region'\n",
        ").size().reset_index(name='flip_count')\n",
        "\n",
        "# Sort highest to lowest\n",
        "region_flips = region_flips.sort_values(\n",
        "    by='flip_count',\n",
        "    ascending=False\n",
        ")\n",
        "\n",
        "# Display result\n",
        "print(region_flips)\n",
        "\n",
        "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
        "\n",
        "# Count flipped constituencies by region\n",
        "region_flips = flipped.groupby(\n",
        "    'region'\n",
        ").size().reset_index(name='flip_count')\n",
        "\n",
        "# Sort highest to lowest\n",
        "region_flips = region_flips.sort_values(\n",
        "    by='flip_count',\n",
        "    ascending=False\n",
        ")\n",
        "\n",
        "# Create chart\n",
        "plt.figure(figsize=(12,6))\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.bar(\n",
        "    region_flips['region'],\n",
        "    region_flips['flip_count']\n",
        ")\n",
        "\n",
        "# Rotate labels\n",
        "plt.xticks(rotation=45)\n",
        "\n",
        "# Labels and title\n",
        "plt.xlabel('Region')\n",
        "plt.ylabel('Number of Flipped Constituencies')\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.title('Flipped Constituencies by Region')\n",
        "\n",
        "# Prevent label cutting\n",
        "plt.tight_layout()\n",
        "\n",
        "# SAVE FIRST\n",
        "plt.savefig(\"region_flips.png\", dpi=300)\n",
        "\n",
        "# THEN SHOW\n",
        "plt.show()\n",
        "\n",
        "region_flips.to_csv(\"region_flips.csv\", index=False)\n",
        "\n",
        "from google.colab import files\n",
        "files.download(\"region_flips.csv\")"
      ],

            ],
            "application/javascript": [
              "\n",
              "    async function download(id, filename, size) {\n",
              "      if (!google.colab.kernel.accessAllowed) {\n",
              "        return;\n",
              "      }\n",
              "      const div = document.createElement('div');\n",
              "      const label = document.createElement('label');\n",
              "      label.textContent = `Downloading \"${filename}\": `;\n",
              "      div.appendChild(label);\n",
              "      const progress = document.createElement('progress');\n",
              "      progress.max = size;\n",
              "      div.appendChild(progress);\n",
              "      document.body.appendChild(div);\n",
              "\n",
              "      const buffers = [];\n",
              "      let downloaded = 0;\n",
              "\n",
              "      const channel = await google.colab.kernel.comms.open(id);\n",
              "      // Send a message to notify the kernel that we're ready.\n",
              "      channel.send({})\n",
              "\n",
              "      for await (const message of channel.messages) {\n",
              "        // Send a message to notify the kernel that we're ready.\n",
              "        channel.send({})\n",
              "        if (message.buffers) {\n",
              "          for (const buffer of message.buffers) {\n",
              "            buffers.push(buffer);\n",
              "            downloaded += buffer.byteLength;\n",
              "            progress.value = downloaded;\n",
              "          }\n",
              "        }\n",
              "      }\n",
              "      const blob = new Blob(buffers, {type: 'application/binary'});\n",
              "      const a = document.createElement('a');\n",
              "      a.href = window.URL.createObjectURL(blob);\n",
              "      a.download = filename;\n",
              "      div.appendChild(a);\n",
              "      a.click();\n",
              "      div.remove();\n",
              "    }\n",
              "  "
            ]
          },
          "metadata": {}
        },
        {
          "output_type": "display_data",
          "data": {
            "text/plain": [
              "<IPython.core.display.Javascript object>"
            ],
            "application/javascript": [
              "download(\"download_8f8910a5-aa43-4102-a5a4-2842a28d34ae\", \"region_flips.csv\", 82)"
            ]
          },
          "metadata": {}
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "# Sort 2026 results by constituency and votes\n",
        "sorted_2026 = df2026.sort_values(\n",
        "    ['ac_number', 'votes'],\n",
        "    ascending=[True, False]\n",
        ")\n",
        "\n",
        "# Get top 2 candidates in each constituency\n",
        "top2 = sorted_2026.groupby(\n",
        "    'ac_number'\n",
        ").head(2)\n",
        "\n",
        "# Create margin calculation\n",
        "margin_data = []\n",
        "\n",
        "for ac_no in top2['ac_number'].unique():\n",
        "\n",
        "    temp = top2[top2['ac_number'] == ac_no]\n",
        "\n",
        "    if len(temp) == 2:\n",
        "\n",
        "        winner = temp.iloc[0]\n",
        "        runner = temp.iloc[1]\n",
        "\n",
        "        margin = winner['votes'] - runner['votes']\n",
        "\n",
        "        margin_data.append({\n",
        "            'constituency': winner['constituency'],\n",
        "            'winner_party': winner['party'],\n",
        "            'runner_party': runner['party'],\n",
        "            'margin': margin,\n",
        "            'region': winner['region']\n",
        "        })\n",
        "\n",
        "# Convert to dataframe\n",
        "margin_df = pd.DataFrame(margin_data)\n",
        "\n",
        "# Show closest races\n",
        "closest_races = margin_df.sort_values(\n",
        "    by='margin'\n",
        ")\n",
        "\n",
        "print(closest_races.head(20))\n",
        "\n",
        "import pandas as pd\n",
        "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
        "\n",
        "# Sort 2026 results\n",
        "sorted_2026 = df2026.sort_values(\n",
        "    ['ac_number', 'votes'],\n",
        "    ascending=[True, False]\n",
        ")\n",
        "\n",
        "# Get top 2 candidates in each constituency\n",
        "top2 = sorted_2026.groupby(\n",
        "    'ac_number'\n",
        ").head(2)\n",
        "\n",
        "# Calculate margins\n",
        "margin_data = []\n",
        "\n",
        "for ac_no in top2['ac_number'].unique():\n",
        "\n",
        "    temp = top2[top2['ac_number'] == ac_no]\n",
        "\n",
        "    if len(temp) == 2:\n",
        "\n",
        "        winner = temp.iloc[0]\n",
        "        runner = temp.iloc[1]\n",
        "\n",
        "        margin = winner['votes'] - runner['votes']\n",
        "\n",
        "        margin_data.append({\n",
        "            'constituency': winner['constituency'],\n",
        "            'winner_party': winner['party'],\n",
        "            'runner_party': runner['party'],\n",
        "            'margin': margin\n",
        "        })\n",
        "\n",
        "# Create dataframe\n",
        "margin_df = pd.DataFrame(margin_data)\n",
        "\n",
        "# Closest races\n",
        "closest_races = margin_df.sort_values(\n",
        "    by='margin'\n",
        ").head(10)\n",
        "\n",
        "# Plot chart\n",
        "plt.figure(figsize=(12,6))\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.barh(\n",
        "    closest_races['constituency'],\n",
        "    closest_races['margin']\n",
        ")\n",
        "\n",
        "# Labels and title\n",
        "plt.xlabel('Victory Margin')\n",
        "plt.ylabel('Constituency')\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.title('Top 10 Closest Races in 2026')\n",
        "\n",
        "# Prevent cutting\n",
        "plt.tight_layout()\n",
        "\n",
        "# SAVE FIRST\n",
        "plt.savefig(\"closest_races.png\", dpi=300)\n",
        "\n",
        "# THEN SHOW\n",
        "plt.show()\n",
        "\n",
        "closest_races.to_csv(\"closest_races.csv\", index=False)\n",
        "\n",
        "from google.colab import files\n",
        "files.download(\"closest_races.csv\")"
      ],

              "        }\n",
              "      }\n",
              "      const blob = new Blob(buffers, {type: 'application/binary'});\n",
              "      const a = document.createElement('a');\n",
              "      a.href = window.URL.createObjectURL(blob);\n",
              "      a.download = filename;\n",
              "      div.appendChild(a);\n",
              "      a.click();\n",
              "      div.remove();\n",
              "    }\n",
              "  "
            ]
          },

      "source": [
        "import pandas as pd\n",
        "\n",
        "# Create one Excel workbook\n",
        "with pd.ExcelWriter(\"Election_Charts_Data.xlsx\") as writer:\n",
        "\n",
        "    # Sheet 1\n",
        "    flip_summary.to_excel(\n",
        "        writer,\n",
        "        sheet_name=\"Top_Flip_Patterns\",\n",
        "        index=False\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    # Sheet 2\n",
        "    region_flips.to_excel(\n",
        "        writer,\n",
        "        sheet_name=\"Region_Flips\",\n",
        "        index=False\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    # Sheet 3\n",
        "    closest_races.to_excel(\n",
        "        writer,\n",
        "        sheet_name=\"Closest_Races\",\n",
        "        index=False\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"Excel file created successfully!\")\n",
        "\n",
        "from google.colab import files\n",
        "\n",
        "files.download(\"Election_Charts_Data.xlsx\")"
      ],

      "outputs": [
        {

        {
          "output_type": "display_data",
          "data": {
            "text/plain": [
              "<IPython.core.display.Javascript object>"
            ],
            "application/javascript": [
              "\n",
              "    async function download(id, filename, size) {\n",
              "      if (!google.colab.kernel.accessAllowed) {\n",
              "        return;\n",
              "      }\n",
              "      const div = document.createElement('div');\n",
              "      const label = document.createElement('label');\n",
              "      label.textContent = `Downloading \"${filename}\": `;\n",
              "      div.appendChild(label);\n",
              "      const progress = document.createElement('progress');\n",
              "      progress.max = size;\n",
              "      div.appendChild(progress);\n",
              "      document.body.appendChild(div);\n",
              "\n",
              "      const buffers = [];\n",
              "      let downloaded = 0;\n",
              "\n",
              "      const channel = await google.colab.kernel.comms.open(id);\n",
              "      // Send a message to notify the kernel that we're ready.\n",
              "      channel.send({})\n",
              "\n",
              "      for await (const message of channel.messages) {\n",
              "        // Send a message to notify the kernel that we're ready.\n",
              "        channel.send({})\n",
              "        if (message.buffers) {\n",
              "          for (const buffer of message.buffers) {\n",
              "            buffers.push(buffer);\n",
              "            downloaded += buffer.byteLength;\n",
              "            progress.value = downloaded;\n",
              "          }\n",
              "        }\n",
              "      }\n",
              "      const blob = new Blob(buffers, {type: 'application/binary'});\n",
              "      const a = document.createElement('a');\n",
              "      a.href = window.URL.createObjectURL(blob);\n",
              "      a.download = filename;\n",
              "      div.appendChild(a);\n",
              "      a.click();\n",
              "      div.remove();\n",
              "    }\n",
              "  "
            ]
          },
          "metadata": {}
        },
        {
          "output_type": "display_data",
          "data": {
            "text/plain": [
              "<IPython.core.display.Javascript object>"
            ],

            ]
          },
          "metadata": {}
        }
      ]
    }
  ]
